description: Chris moved into the nuclear sector when joining NWS in 2023 as Finance Director. He qualified as a Chartered Accountant in 2001 before moving into industry with senior roles at E-ON, BT, Berkeley Group and Legal & General. He holds an Economics/Economic History degree from the University of York and is also a Chartered Public Finance Accountant. Chris has a proven track record of growing businesses, driving efficiency, leading change, providing constructive challenge and building successful teams. He has extensive experience within regulated industries as well as the infrastructure and construction sectors. In addition to his executive roles, Chris served as an Independent Director of a Housing Association for over five years.

details.body:
Chris moved into the nuclear sector when joining NWS in 2023 as Finance Director.

He qualified as a Chartered Accountant in 2001 before moving into industry with senior roles at E-ON, BT, Berkeley Group and Legal & General. He holds an Economics/Economic History degree from the University of York and is also a Chartered Public Finance Accountant.

Chris has a proven track record of growing businesses, driving efficiency, leading change, providing constructive challenge and building successful teams. He has extensive experience within regulated industries as well as the infrastructure and construction sectors.

In addition to his executive roles, Chris served as an Independent Director of a Housing Association for over five years.

In addition to his executive roles, Chris served as an Independent Director of a Housing Association for over five years.
